name: marketing-capture
description: Capture the real running app into marketing assets: auto-detects an available browser backend (claude-in-chrome, Playwright MCP, Claude_Preview, Puppeteer), gets the app on screen, and — behind an up-front consent gate — writes framed screenshots and a native-only demo GIF to marketing/. Reuses design-preview as an opportunistic live-app driver; never installs anything. Ships the capture-assets skill.
